core_loop: Run through floating sky platforms, hit checkpoints, avoid hazards, and finish the course in one session.
session_goal: Reach the finish portal in under five minutes.

systems.description: Save progress at glowing pads and respawn players there after failure.
systems.name: Checkpoint

systems.description: Reset the player when they touch lava or miss the platform route.
systems.name: Hazard

systems.description: Track run duration and show whether the player beat the target time.
systems.name: Timer

target_audience: Roblox players ages 8-14 who like fast skill-based courses.

world.setting: Floating neon skyway above the clouds.
world.tone: Bright arcade challenge with clean checkpoints.
